# Monthly Changelog Reminder:

<img src="https://octodex.github.com/images/filmtocat.png" align="right" height="120px" />

It's time for our monthly Skills project changelog update!

## Action items:

1. **Review the auto-generated changelog in the commited file** as your starting point

2. **Enhance the content** by adding:

   - Additional context or details about new exercises
   - Screenshots or GIFs showing key features
   - Relevant links to documentation or discussions

3. **Create a pull request** in our [skills release repository](https://github.com/skills/releases) with the final version

4. **Assign** a peer to review.

5. Once complete, please merge this pull request. Thanks for keeping our documentation up to date! 📝

## Reference

For styling inspiration, see:

- [VS Code Updates](https://code.visualstudio.com/updates)
- [VS Code Release Notes](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-docs/tree/main/release-notes)
